{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Chroniclers
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Chroniclers]] are a type of individual that the [[Guild]] cannot easily stop from having relationships with [[Silent Ones]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
